name: Barbecue Cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the Jell-O in boiling water.
2. Mix all other ingredients together, and when the Jell-O is at room temperature, stir well.
3. Pour the mixture into an oiled 8-inch square pan.
4. Chill until firm.
5. Cut into cubes and serve atop salad to accompany your barbecue.
